title: ;fixed-walls
description: simple java resource pack that fixes the wall model for more versatile creative building
body:
simple java resource pack that fixes the wall model for more versatile creative building

### features
**⋆** compatible with any resource pack that uses the vanilla wall model\
**⋆** best used with Axiom, debug stick or any other building oriented tool

### credits
pack by red\
[bsky](https://bsky.app/profile/rednls.bsky.social)
